name: Cocoa-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 Egg whites or 1/4 cup Cholesterol-free egg product
1/2 cup Miniature semisweet chocolate chips or 1/2 cup Carob chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, margarine, yogurt, water, vanilla, and chocolate extract.
3. Add egg whites or cholesterol-free egg product to the mixture and stir until combined.
4. Stir in oats, flour, chocolate chips (or carob chips), cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes, or until the cookies are firm and leave little indentation when touched. About 5-1/2 dozen cookies will result.
